methodology: Single-annotator relevance GT built from keyword + entity patterns derived from Pavone 1991, Murialdi 1986, Bosworth 2005, Deakin 1962. Per-pattern rationale stored alongside each gt entry. The 2-week self-consistency check required by the outline is not measured this run; reported as a limitation in §7.2.
